channel.title: Dark Matter on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Dark Matter on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Migdal Effect: When a Prediction Waits 87 Years to Be Seen
item.description: In 1939, Arkady Migdal predicted that a recoiling atomic nucleus could eject an electron. In 2026, we finally observed it directly. What does this mean for an AI processing quantum physics?
